author: Donna
title: Who bought the Evasion Book and what did you think of it?
body:
I have always been afraid of anything "ebook" assuming that it's a scam or marketing thing... But after years of trial-and-error I consider myself having a master's degree in this stuff, and bought the book just to see if there are any little tricks I might have overlooked.

Let me say if you're thinking about getting into this space then don't even bother until you've read the Evasion Book. It's well done, and not at all the same thing as garbage ebooks out there. There are no sales add-ons at the end, etc.

100% NOT clipped and pasted from somewhere else, 100% professional and there are no hidden agendas. SOLID info, well organized and I learned a lot from it, even with my years of experience.

Anyway, I wrote all that just so that anyone else on the fence knows that the book is both CHEAP and what I'd consider the BEST. Don't even BOTHER to start before breezing through it.

author: GreenBean
body: For starters no one should 'breeze' through the book. It takes more than that even for people with experience. It's a very well constructed book. It has been purchased by many users. Everyone is different. Some people may go your way and think before they do anything. Others will jump in the deep end. That's their right. The forum exists for them as well.

author: jeffweico
title: Will save time, money and aggravation
body:
I have been on the forums for a few months, and I finally bought the guide. I thought I was pretty knowledgeable about stealth methods, but I found several tips that I was unaware of.

The bottom line is, you could pick up much of this info by reading around, but it would take a long time and you would have to ask several questions. Even then, this guide could probably teach you a thing or two.

As a business decision, buying this was a no-brainer. It takes time and money to do things PROPERLY and then you have to know how to work it. This guide will easily save me much more than its cost in the future. At the Level 1 price, it is cheap for the knowledge gained.

The most important part is to write down EVERYTHING! Keep Records of Everything! Ask questions on the forum if you need help. Follow those steps and the rest is easy. Ignore them, and you'll regret it.

author: waterproof

quote.author: jeffweico
quote.text: The most important part of this is to write down EVERYTHING! It is probably also the most overlooked. If you write everything down and keep a log, you will have something to refer to that helps you to not make mistakes.

body:
Very true and I did over look this! My apologies to all!
If you have more than 2 accounts then KEEP A LOG of everything! This is important!
For one account, like myself, I keep a new notebook by my monitor all of the time to write down anything and whatever else I consider important.

Remember this is your account and if something goes wrong, you're beginning all over.

author: ebay-stupid
body:
Well, joined today and purchased the Evasion Book and activated... reading it and will try to master it.

will ask you guys the experts if I have any questions or need clarifications!

Thanks!

author: FandangoKango
body:
I bought this book a few months ago and I have made some money and when I lose accounts I have a replacement. It's a good book, I recommend it.

Until right now I give this book a positive to go.

author: simplyblue
title: I've got it
body: I got it about a month ago, I've taken my time reading through it and I am close on setting up my first stealth account, so let's hope and pray I'm up and running next week, keep you informed!

author: TBellaWynn
title: Signing up but what name for contact info
body:
Hi everyone. I've been taking my time reading the Evasion Book. It's an awesome book by the way!! I'm not sure if I would try to get back if it wasn't for this book! I've read it over and over many times in a time frame of over a month now and being real careful not to make any mistakes.

After reading the posts on here, looks like everyone finds it very positive. I've learned a whole lot. I'm very much into business and making money — but generally a person like me wouldn't be working on routers and IPs and stuff, but I'm doing just that after reading this book! Of course as you go through setting up everything, you will probably have some minor questions... just take your time, find your answers and set it up. I just set up my first account and working on my second. Good luck!

author: ets
body:
After getting suspended I had a bleak Christmas and didn't know where to turn to. I spoke to my supplier who referred me to another seller who then directed me here. I purchased the Evasion Book and to date I have 5 accounts up and running smoothly.

I must admit because I was broke, I couldn't afford to buy Level 2 and opted for Level 1 instead. I couldn't have spent that money on anything better. It was the best investment I have ever made. My trick is every week I revisit the guide, re-read it to see if I've missed anything.

To @refundgod, I am indebted to you. I thought all was lost and I wouldn't have been able to provide for my family as I have a young daughter who I am home with. Thank you, thank you. I am forever grateful and there are no words to describe my thanks for getting me back on my feet!

author: mississippighost

quote.author: ets
quote.text: After getting suspended I had a bleak Christmas and didn't know where to turn to... It was the best investment I have ever made. I am indebted to @refundgod. Thank you, thank you.

body: Amen to that!

author: junkieghost11
body: I cannot describe how valuable the information in this book is. I really believe if anyone owns this book they can own an unlimited number of verified, stable accounts. My thanks to the writer of the book can't define how proud I am to own such a fabulous top-secret guide. It really works.

author: Misti427
title: I'm Loving the Evasion Book!
body: One of the best purchases that I have made is this awesome guide! I'm taking my time and following the rules and I am almost ready to get back. I was able to create a brand new (legal) identity, home address, get a brand new IP address and everything that I needed. It's a pain... but it's the one we all need if we want to make money. I'll let you know how I make out!

author: bootedbyebay
title: I hope this book works...
body:
I'm going to buy the book Tuesday.
I really hope that it works...

I was a member for 7 years, had 2640 feedback (99.8% positive). Purchased an item and tried to resell it for a profit. They said it was a trademark violation, and they suspended me. They also suspended my wife, 2 of my friends, and my boss (who is very mad at me now because he used that account to sell stuff for his business).

I really need to get back, I am losing money every day. I will give my review on the book after I read it.

author: Misti427
title: Best eBook I've ever read! It works!
body:
Trust me... this guide works. Follow the directions carefully and you will be back. I was a powerseller for 8 years with a 100% feedback rating and was booted because one customer reported one of my items as counterfeit, which of course wasn't — I had sold hundreds of the same item for 2 years straight with no complaints.

This book is so precise and helpful. Yes you will have to start from scratch, but it's worth it. Buy the book... you can't go wrong.

author: catherinemcclanahan
body: I bought the book almost two weeks ago, and I must say this book cuts through the chase. I'm reading and reading and I hope to have my business up and running really soon. The Evasion Book is in detail especially about why most accounts get suspended in the first place. I'll keep up to date on how things are taking off. I recommend getting this book.

author: 2kmagic
body:
This book is one of the best online books I have ever spent my money on. Usually I don't fall for nice-looking website pages claiming this and that.

But this is a book you should get if you're suspended, and even if you just want to know what to do in case things go south.

Give it a try... I bought one and I'm in the process of putting things together.

author: Misti427
title: Best E-Book Ever! It works!
body:
Back up and running with no problems thanks to this awesome guide! Glad to be back.

Love the Evasion Book — and the Level 2 mentorship from @refundgod is also awesome and a great way to really scale things. I have made really good money following the Level 2 strategies and the ROI is incredible!

author: TBellaWynn
title: Update — it's working
body:
8 years of being booted for nothing — I see now they don't care how long a seller has been selling or even with excellent feedback.

As far as the book is concerned, I think you will find it quite helpful. After reading the posts on here, looks like everyone finds it very positive. I've learned a whole lot. Of course as you go through setting up things, you will probably have some minor questions... just take your time, find your answers and set it up. I just set up my first account and working on my second. Good luck!

author: newjerseymax
body:
This is make or break for me on buying the book.

My account finally suspended 30 days after 18 months... I need something comprehensive. Going in.

author: @refundgod
body: The Evasion Book (Level 1 — $149) covers the complete step-by-step framework. Level 2 ($399) includes personal mentorship and advanced strategies. Alternative payment options are always available — PM me if you have any questions.
